sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 FLOAT, value2 VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 2.5, r'A\bB\cC'), (2, 3.6, r'D\eE\fF');
SELECT id, sql_add(value1, value1) AS double_value, r'value2' AS raw_string FROM test_table WHERE value1 > 2.0;
SELECT id, sql_add(sql_add(value1, 1), r'A\bB') AS complex_addition FROM test_table ORDER BY double_value;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO another_table (id, test_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, r'Test\1'), (2, 2, r'Test\2');
SELECT a.id, sql_add(a.value1, (SELECT SUM(a1.value1) FROM test_table a1 WHERE a1.id < a.id)) AS sum_value FROM test_table a WHERE a.value2 LIKE r'Test\%';
SELECT a.id, sql_add(value1, 0) AS zero_addition FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.test_id WHERE b.description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sql_add(value1, NULL) AS null_case FROM test_table WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL HAVING sum_value < 6;
SELECT r'Value is: ' || sql_add(value1, value1) AS combined_value FROM test_table ORDER BY combined_value DESC;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_column TIMESTAMP;
UPDATE test_table SET new_column = sql_add(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00', INTERVAL '1 DAY') WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, sql_add(value1, 1) AS temp_value FROM test_table WHERE value1 < 3.0;
SELECT id, temp_value, r'Temporary string\' FROM temp_table ORDER BY temp_value ASC;
